title: Supported Employment Goal Plan
text:
## Supported Employment Goal Plan

**Long-term goal:** Work as a {job} in a {adjective} setting near {place}.

**Short-term goal:** Apply to {number} jobs before {day of week}.

**Supports:** Employment specialist, {person}, and one {adjective} checklist.

**Practice skill:** {verb ending in -ing} interview answers without staring at the {object}.

**Accommodation idea:** A {color} schedule, quieter {place}, and permission to {verb} when feeling {emotion}.

**Celebration plan:** Eat {food}, make a {sound}, and mark progress with {plural noun}.
